description: A card on a blue mottled background. Five photographs of men are styled as overlapping white-framed snapshots scattered across the frame, each captioned in handwritten-style black marker: 'AGGRAVATED ASSAULT,' 'PROSTITUTION,' 'ILLEGAL REENTRY & DUI,' 'DUI,' and 'ASSAULT X3 & DUI.' A dark diagonal banner across the upper left reads in white '41 arrested in sex trafficking op.' The lower left carries the DHS seal, the white serif 'ICE' wordmark, a red bar with white bold 'LEARN MORE,' and the URL 'ICE.gov/newsroom.'
notable_text: 41 arrested in sex trafficking op; AGGRAVATED ASSAULT; PROSTITUTION; ILLEGAL REENTRY & DUI; DUI; ASSAULT X3 & DUI; ICE LEARN MORE ICE.gov/newsroom
